title: Robust validation suite: block-bootstrap + synthetic stress + DSR/PBO sweep
source: quant-phd-advisor re-review (2026-05-30) under the long-horizon + future-equity frame, verified against a reproduced full-history backtest (scripts/backtest_survival_book.py, 2000-01-03 -> 2026-05-29, 26.4y).
why: The current backtest is ONE historical trajectory (one benign sample): no error bar on maxDD/vol, no synthetic crisis, SOL only ~1.4y so the full-crypto regime is under-sampled, and the kill-switch stress uses artificial thresholds not realistic price shocks. For a long-horizon product the honest output is a DISTRIBUTION and an insensitivity frontier, not a single number. Canonical methods per the quant advisor: stationary block bootstrap (Politis-Romano 1994) with automatic block length (Politis-White 2004) for maxDD/vol distributions; parametric synthetic stress (reuse stress_covariance machinery to GENERATE corr->1, crypto weekend mass-gap on gap_assets, FX shock) to verify caps/kills hold; parameter sweep GATED by CPCV (purged+embargo) + Deflated Sharpe Ratio (Bailey-LdP 2014, corrects for #trials) + PBO via CSCV (Bailey et al. 2015) -- pick by robust plateau, not peak.
value_rationale: H: turns 'the backtest runs' into 'the risk machinery survives the distribution of futures' -- the core evidence a real product needs, and the harness that lets B0108-B0111 be evaluated without overfitting.
scope: Stationary block bootstrap (Politis-Romano 1994, Politis-White 2004 auto block length) of the multi-asset path -> p5/p50/p95 of maxDD and realized vol. MUST resample ALIGNED-MULTIVARIATE blocks on a COMMON calendar and PRESERVE gap days, else the maxDD distribution understates the weekend-crypto gap tail apply_risk_controls (survival_book.py:489) was built for.

Synthetic stress: corr->1, crypto weekend mass-gap, FX shock; assert crypto var-cap, per-asset caps, gap-aware kill, DD latch hold. ADD a NON-self-referential historical overlay (2020-03 / 2022 crypto cascade) -- not only parametric corr->1 from the book's own stress_covariance (circular: confirms the book survives its own assumption).
Parameter sweep over vol_window, max_leverage, crypto_var_cap reported as a robustness PLATEAU; gate with CPCV + Deflated Sharpe + PBO/CSCV; never report the in-sample best.
recommendation: DO FIRST. This hard-gates (blocks) B0108 and B0109 -- changes to realized risk must be evaluated on distributions, not the single FX-dominated 26y path. B0110/B0111 are safe to proceed in parallel.
out_of_scope: Walk-forward purge/embargo of the continuously-held book (no overlapping triple-barrier windows; causality is the bar-close shift).
